description_long: This is a modern L-shaped desk with a light gray wood finish, featuring a spacious work surface and a distinctive cut-out for ergonomic seating. The left side of the desk includes a set of two drawers and a larger cabinet, providing ample storage for office supplies or documents. The right side is supported by a single sturdy metal leg, giving the desk a contemporary, open look while ensuring stability. The top surface is smooth and expansive, suitable for computers, paperwork, or other work-related items. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a neutral color palette that would blend well in professional or home office environments. The materials and construction suggest durability and functionality, ideal for daily use.
description: A modern L-shaped desk with a light gray wood finish, featuring drawers and a cabinet on one side and a metal leg on the other for support. The desk offers a spacious, smooth work surface and a minimalist, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the drawers and cabinet, as well as the full L-shape and solid wood panel sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the single metal leg supporting the right side.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full L-shaped work surface, the cut-out for seating, and the arrangement of drawers and cabinet.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid wood panel and the open leg space beneath the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers and cabinet, with the open cut-out section designed for seating and legroom, while the solid panel and metal leg form the sides and back.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or office desk for administrative tasks
